title: AnySimLite: A Lightweight Few-Shot Similarity Encoder for On-Device Speech-Adjacent Classification
abstract: arXiv:2606.26452v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: To minimize privacy concerns and inference latency on edge devices like smartphones, lightweight on-device models remain important for end-user applications. Many of these applications involve natural language classification, but deploying multiple specialized models creates a memory footprint challenge. We investigate: Can a single lightweight architecture solve multiple Speech-Adjacent (SA) classification tasks through reduction to a nuanced text similarity formulation? We propose AnySimLite, a lightweight similarity encoder that combines word-level and character-level channels. Together with a dataset transformation strategy, we evaluate AnySimLite across multiple SA classification tasks and show that it consistently achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) or SOTA-competitive performance in few-shot settings while maintaining a low memory footprint. Even in the worst case, the performance drop remains below 7% while using $<\frac{1}{250}^{\m

Title: AnySimLite: A Lightweight Few-Shot Similarity Encoder for On-Device Speech-Adjacent Classification
Abstract: arXiv:2606.26452v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: To minimize privacy concerns and inference latency on edge devices like smartphones, lightweight on-device models remain important for end-user applications. Many of these applications involve natural language classification, but deploying multiple specialized models creates a memory footprint challenge. We propose AnySimLite, a lightweight similarity encoder that combines word-level and character-level channels. Even in the worst case, the performance drop remains below 7% while using $<\frac{1}{250}^{\m
translated_title: AnySimLite：一种用于设备端语音相关分类的轻量级少样本相似度编码器
translated_abstract: arXiv:2606.26452v1 公告类型：新 摘要：为了最大程度减少隐私问题和边缘设备（如智能手机）上的推理延迟，轻量级的设备端模型对最终用户应用仍然很重要。许多此类应用涉及自然语言分类，但部署多个专门模型会带来内存占用挑战。我们研究：能否通过将多个语音相关（SA）分类任务简化为一种精细的文本相似度公式，用单一轻量级架构解决它们？我们提出AnySimLite，一种结合词级和字符级通道的轻量级相似度编码器。结合一种数据集转换策略，我们在多个SA分类任务上评估AnySimLite，并表明它在少样本设置中持续达到最先进（SOTA）或接近SOTA的性能，同时保持低内存占用。即使在最差情况下，性能下降也保持在7%以下，而使用的内存不到（原文中`<\frac{1}{250}^{\m`似乎不完整，推测为小于1/250的比例）。
tldr: AnySimLite通过单一轻量级架构结合词级和字符级通道，将多个语音相关分类任务简化为文本相似度问题，在少样本设置中以极低内存占用达到最先进或接近最先进的性能。
en_tdlr: AnySimLite combines word-level and character-level channels in a single lightweight architecture, reducing multiple speech-adjacent classification tasks to a text similarity formulation, achieving SOTA or SOTA-competitive performance in few-shot settings with minimal memory footprint.
